Got stranded on a tropical island. Had to skin 15 tapirs to make a wallet big enough to hold my money.
A blue blur runs incredibly fast through loops and collects gold rings until he touches a spike and loses everything.
Swinging glowing swords at blocks coming towards me to the rhythm of electronic music. A serious arm workout.
I am screaming at my friends to pass me the tomatoes while our kitchen is literally on fire and split across two moving trucks.
Emerged from a vault into a radioactive wasteland full of bugs, glitches, and other players launching nukes at my camp.
A white-haired demon hunter juggles enemies in the air with dual pistols while eating pizza.
I became the mayor of a town full of talking animals, and my biggest priority is catching a tarantula.
A ginger with a glowing sword gets repeatedly thrown off cliffs by giant frogs on a distant planet.
Strumming a plastic instrument with colorful buttons trying to convince myself I'm a rock god.
A furry mechanic and his robotic backpack travel the galaxy turning enemies into sheep and pixel art.
Riding a horse across a desolate land to stab 16 giant stone creatures, all while feeling incredibly guilty.
Pushing a cart into a beam of energy went terribly wrong, and now I'm fighting aliens with a crowbar in a research facility.
You're a cube of raw beef sliding down walls of saws to save a bandage from a fetus in a jar.
A lonely guy in a tower talks to his boss on a walkie-talkie while worrying about teenagers setting the forest on fire.
Flew my spaceship from a toxic purple planet to an ice planet. Scanned some weird rocks. Got bored, but it's much better than at launch.
